zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Belknap於大約1372年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾時，她的父親Robert Belknap44歲，母親Sybell Juliana de Dorset33歲。她於1394年之前與Ralph Stonor結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1419年之前在英國，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾格亞特 哈普登。

nameMeanings.name: Belknap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: probably a habitational name from a lost or unidentified place, the second element of which is most likely Middle English knappe ‘hilltop’. Compare Belnap .
History: Abraham Belknap (c. 1588–c. 1643) emigrated from Latton, Essex, England, to Lynn, MA, in the 1630s.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Belknap was born about 1372, in Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Robert Belknap, was 44 and her mother, Sybell Juliana de Dorset, was 33. She married Ralph Stonor before 1394. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died before 1419, in England, and was buried in Great Hampden, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Belknap est née environ 1372, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Belknap, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Sybell Juliana de Dorset, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph Stonor avant 1394. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée avant 1419, à Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Great Hampden, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Belknapが約1372年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert Belknapは44歳，母Sybell Juliana de Dorsetは33歳であった。1394年以前にRalph Stonorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1419年以前にイギリスで死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアグレアト ハンプデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Belknap(이)가 대략 1372년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Belknap(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sybell Juliana de Dorset(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1394년 이전 Ralph Stonor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1419년 이전 영국에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 그리트 함p든에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Belknap родилась около 1372 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Belknap было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Sybell Juliana de Dorset, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Stonor перед 1394 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла перед 1419 г. в местности Англия и была похоронена в местности грит хампден, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
